Corporate & B2B Gifting

Send 10,000 gift cards by Friday.

Upload a CSV, schedule the send, watch them deliver. Custom branding per program, per-recipient personalisation, and white-glove approval workflows when finance needs to sign off.

  • ✓ Programmatic CSV upload with field mapping and dry-run preview
  • ✓ Multi-step approval — finance signs off before mass-issuance
  • ✓ Volume pricing & invoicing for orders of 1,000+ at a time
  • ✓ Real-time delivery dashboard with bounce/open/redemption tracking

Refunds-as-Credit

Recover 60% of refund revenue.

When a customer wants a refund, offer them store credit instead — with a small bonus. Most accept. Cash stays in your business, lifetime value goes up, and customer satisfaction climbs because you said "yes" to credit instead of "wait 5–7 days" to a refund.

  • ✓ Dynamic incentives — offer +10%, +15%, or +20% bonus tuned to LTV
  • ✓ Embedded in returns flow — Shopify, Loop, Returnly, custom portals
  • ✓ Auto-credit instead of refund for damaged or late shipments
  • ✓ Full audit trail from return reason to credit issuance to redemption
Learn about refunds-as-credit →
1
Customer requests refund
Order #NW-4291 · $185.00 · Reason: didn't fit
2
99minds offers store credit + 15%
"Get $212.75 in store credit instead — instantly"
3
Customer accepts
63% accept on average — no cash leaves the business
$212.75 credit issued · LTV +1.4× Customer redeems within 30 days · 81% of the time
Omnichannel

Issue anywhere. Redeem everywhere.

One balance, one ledger. A card sold online redeems at the POS. A refund issued by support shows up in the wallet. No reconciliation hell. No "sorry, we can't see that on this system."

  • ✓ Real-time balance sync across web, mobile, POS, support, and wallet
  • ✓ Pre-built integrations with Shopify, BigCommerce, Salesforce, Square, Toast
  • ✓ Customer service tools — issue, void, reissue, transfer in two clicks

Drop in your logo, choose your palette, and ship pixel-perfect eGifts that match your brand system. No design ticket required.

For developers

Issue your first gift card in five lines of code.

Idempotent endpoints. Webhooks for every state change. Sandbox parity. SDKs in seven languages. The kind of API your team won't dread.

Seven SDKs, one mental model

Node, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, Java, .NET. Same shape, same idioms, same docs.

Idempotency keys built in

Retry safely. Network blips never double-issue a card. Distributed-systems hygiene by default.

60+ webhook event types

Subscribe to exactly the events you need. Signed payloads. At-least-once delivery. Exponential retry.

// Issue a $50 branded eGift, push to wallet, log to ledger import NinetyNine from '99minds'; const client = new NinetyNine('sk_live_•••'); const giftCard = await client.giftCards.create( amount: 5000, // $50.00 currency: 'usd', recipient: email: 'ada@example.com', name: 'Ada Lovelace' , design: 'birthday_purple', message: 'Happy birthday, Ada!', wallet_pass: true, delivery: 'email' , idempotencyKey: 'birthday-ada-2026' ); console.log(giftCard.id); // gc_8KPq2x9LmZ
Fraud, Compliance & Trust

Built for the security review.

Gift cards attract fraud — that's why we obsess over the security stack so you don't have to staff a team for it.

ML fraud engine

Velocity checks, device fingerprinting, behavioural models, and graph analysis catch organised fraud before it lands. Trained on $2.4B of stored value.

0.04%
Average fraud loss across our customer base

PCI tokenisation

Card numbers tokenised at rest and in transit. Your application never touches sensitive data. PCI scope reduces from your whole stack to zero.

PCI L1
Audited annually by an external QSA

Escheatment & state law

Unclaimed property compliance for all 50 US states. Automatic dormancy tracking, state-specific reporting, and breakage accounting that keeps your CFO happy.

50 / 50
US states + 14 international jurisdictions covered
Why teams switch from Rise.ai & Blackhawk

Built for the modern stack.

Rise.ai built for Shopify. Blackhawk built for retail at the dawn of plastic cards. We built for what comes next.
